description: SETUP: requires the Mend Renovate GitHub App enabled on the Innovar-Healthcare org (or a
self-hosted Renovate). The dhi.io base is a PRIVATE registry — configure its pull credential
as an APP-LEVEL hostRule (Mend dashboard: host=dhi.io, or self-hosted config.js hostRules with
env), NOT here: a repo-config hostRule that references a `{{ secrets.* }}` that isn't set makes
Renovate abort the ENTIRE run for this repo (init-phase 'Unknown secrets name'). Without the
dhi.io credential Renovate still manages Actions + the Rocky base; only the Corretto DHI base
Manages: GitHub Actions versions and Dockerfile base images; pins everything to digests so
updates arrive as deliberate PRs that CI (test-dhi/test-rocky) and the Trivy scan gate.

packageRules.description: Group GitHub Actions bumps into one PR.
Rocky base image (Dockerfile) — its own PR so a base bump is reviewed in isolation.
Corretto Docker Hardened Image base (Dockerfile.dhi, dev + runtime variants).
